---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ayush-mahansaria
---

**Problem / motivation**
What problem would this feature solve? Who benefits?

**Proposed solution**
Describe the feature. Include API changes, new endpoints, or UI changes if applicable.

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches you thought about and why you ruled them out.

**Implementation notes** *(optional)*
Any technical constraints, relevant LangChain / FAISS APIs, or existing code to build on.

**Priority**
- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Important
- [ ] Blocking a use case
